subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! The servant who is present hath presented himself with thy letter and laid it before the Face. Verily, thy Lord is the All-Hearing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالله قد حضر العبد الحاضر بکتابک و عرضه تلقاء الوجه ان ربک لهو السمیع
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
